name: the-art-of-loving
description: Erich Fromm's The Art of Loving — explore love as an art that requires knowledge and practice, covering the four elements of love, the five types of love, and how to cultivate genuine love in modern society
useCase: Helps anyone understand love as a skill to be practiced rather than a feeling to be found — through the framework of care, responsibility, respect, and knowledge applied to all types of love.
knownRisks: Fromm's analysis is psychoanalytic and philosophical — it offers insight, not step-by-step relationship advice
